title: Dip Dye
description: A mod that allows dyeing stuff in cauldrons
body:
## Dip dye
Dyeing in cauldrons.

The mod adds two types of dyeing.
1. Vanilla coloring with dyes
2. Additive coloring using dye bottles and vials.

Usage: 
Put water in a cauldron and right-click to add colors! You can then put dyeable items in the cauldron by also right clicking it. Increase the water level without changing the color by adding water bottles.
